tasks.description: Add informative progress feedback to the neos-installer-partition.sh script using simple progress bars.
Ensure Calamares branding icons and colors are consistent with the NeOS brand identity.
Review milestone outputs in partitioning script. They are functional, but could be integrated into Calamares logs or visual progress bars more tightly.
Format the network detection messages for better user visibility during boot.
Consider integrating partitioning milestone status directly into the Calamares UI via DBus or a progress file.
